title: Grilled Chorizo Skewers with Algerian Spice
description: A flavorful and spicy dish perfect for grilling, inspired by North African cuisine.

ingredients.name: Algerian Spice Blend
ingredients.notes: Available at most spice stores or online

ingredients.name: Crispy Onions (such as shallots or pearl onions)

instructions: Thread chorizo, crispy onions, and cilantro onto skewers.
Brush with golden olive oil and season with Algerian Spice Blend.
Grill skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally.
Serve hot, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
